/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Exports the contents of a grid (using the selected order and filters) to an Excel file. LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'OpenDocument'
&CellRow = 1 &FirstColumn = 1
Do 'LoadGridState'
Do 'WriteFilters'
Do 'WriteColumnTitles'
Do 'WriteData'
Do 'CloseDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Sub 'OpenDocument'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&Random = Random() * 10000 &Filename = !"ExportWWTabelaImposto-" + &Random.ToString().Trim() + !".xlsx"
&ExcelDocument.Open(&Filename) Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Clear()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'WriteFilters'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not (&ImpLctCod.IsEmpty() AND &ImpUfeCod.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Tipo.Lcto.") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &ImpLctCod WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, false, &CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2, "Destino") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&ImpUfeCod) EndIf
If not (&ImpFilCod.IsEmpty() AND &ImpGruImpCod.IsEmpty() AND &ImpCatCod.IsEmpty()) WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, true, &CellRow, &FirstColumn, "Grup.Filial") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &ImpFilCod WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, false, &CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2, "Pessoas") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Number = &ImpGruImpCod WWP_ExportWriteFilter(&ExcelDocument, false, &CellRow, &FirstColumn + 4, "Produtos") &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 5).Number = &ImpCatCod EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCFOCOD' &ImpCfoCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpCfoCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CFOP" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&ImpCfoCod1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'SITCOD' &SitCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &SitCod1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Situacao" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = '' do Case Case &SitCod1 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "00 - TRIBUTADA INTEGRALMENTE"
Case &SitCod1 = 02 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "02 - TRIBUTACAO MONOFASICA PROPRIA - SOBRE COMBUSTIVEIS"
Case &SitCod1 = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "10 - TRIBUTADA E COM COBRANÇA ICMS POR S.T."
Case &SitCod1 = 15 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "15 - TRIBUTACAO MONOFASICA PROPRIA COM RETENCAO - SOBRE COMBUSTIVEIS"
Case &SitCod1 = 20 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "20 - COM REDUÇÃO DE BASE DE CALCULO"
Case &SitCod1 = 30 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "30 - ISENTA OU NÃO TRIBUTADA, COM COBRANCA DO ICMS POR S.T."
Case &SitCod1 = 40 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "40 - ISENTA"
Case &SitCod1 = 41 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "41 - NÃO TRIBUTADA"
Case &SitCod1 = 50 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "50 - SUSPENSÃO"
Case &SitCod1 = 51 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "51 - DIFERIMENTO"
Case &SitCod1 = 53 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "53 - TRIBUTACAO MONOFASICA COM DIFERIMENTO - SOBRE COMBUSTIVEIS"
Case &SitCod1 = 60 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "60 - ICMS COBRADO ANTERIORMENTE POR S.T."
Case &SitCod1 = 61 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "61 - TRIBUTACAO MONOFASICA COBRADO ANTERIORMENTE - SOBRE COMBUSTIVEIS"
Case &SitCod1 = 70 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "70 - COM REDUÇÃO DE BASE DE CÁLCULO E COBRANÇA DO ICMS POR S.T."
Case &SitCod1 = 90 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "90 - OUTRAS"
Case &SitCod1 = 101 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "101 - TRIBUTADA PELO SIMPLES NACIONAL, COM PERMISSÃO DE CRÉDITO ICMS"
Case &SitCod1 = 102 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "102 - TRIBUTADA PELO SIMPLES NACIONAL, SEM PERMISSÃO DE CRÉDITO ICMS"
Case &SitCod1 = 103 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "103 - ISENÇÃO DO ICMS NO SIMPLES NACIONAL PARA FAIXA DE RECEITA BRUTA"
Case &SitCod1 = 201 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "201 - TRIBUTADA PELO SIMPLES NACIONAL, COM PERMISSÃO DE CRÉDITO ICMS E COM COBRANÇA DO S.T."
Case &SitCod1 = 202 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "202 - TRIBUTADA PELO SIMPLES NACIONAL, SEM PERMISSÃO DE CRÉDITO ICMS E COM COBRANÇA DO S.T."
Case &SitCod1 = 203 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "203 - ISENÇÃO DO ICMS NO SIMPLES NACIONAL, PARA FAIXA DE RECEITA BRUTA E COM COBRANÇA DE S.T."
Case &SitCod1 = 300 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "300 - IMUNE"
Case &SitCod1 = 400 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "400 - NÃO TRIBUTADA PELO SIMPLES NACIONAL"
Case &SitCod1 = 500 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "500 - ICMS COBRADO ANTERIORMENTE POR S.T.(SUBSTITUÍDO) OU ANTECIPAÇÃO"
Case &SitCod1 = 900 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "900 - OUTROS"
EndCase EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCOFINSRED' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpCofinsRed1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpCofinsRed1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "cofins", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "cofins", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "cofins", ">") EndCase &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &ImpCofinsRed1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCOFINS' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpCofins1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpCofins1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Cofins", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Cofins", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Cofins", ">") EndCase &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &ImpCofins1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCBENEF' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpCBenef1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpCBenef1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "CBenef", "WWP_FilterLike") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "CBenef", "WWP_FilterContains") EndCase &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&ImpCBenef1) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPALQMVA' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpAlqMVA1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpAlqMVA1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "MVA", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "MVA", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "MVA", ">") EndCase &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &ImpAlqMVA1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPDIF' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpDif1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpDif1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Diferimento", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Diferimento", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Diferimento", ">") EndCase &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &ImpDif1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPDTAALT' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpDtaAlt1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &ImpDtaAlt_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) &PrintFilterValue = False If not &ImpDtaAlt1.IsEmpty() OR not &ImpDtaAlt_To1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Alteração" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "WWP_FilterPast" Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Alteração" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "WWP_FilterToday" Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Alteração" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "WWP_FilterInTheFuture" Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Alteração", "WWP_FilterRange") &PrintFilterValue = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 2).Text = " - " EndCase If &PrintFilterValue &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Date = &ImpDtaAlt1 If &PrintFilterValue &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 3).Date = &ImpDtaAlt_To1 EndIf EndIf EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPIPI' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpIPI1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpIPI1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "IPI", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "IPI", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "IPI", ">") EndCase &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &ImpIPI1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPPIS' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpPis1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpPis1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Pis", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Pis", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Pis", ">") EndCase &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &ImpPis1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPPISRED' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpPisRed1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpPisRed1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "PIS", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "PIS", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "PIS", ">") EndCase &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &ImpPisRed1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPREDALQICMEXT' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpRedAlqIcmExt1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpRedAlqIcmExt1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Aliquota Externa", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Aliquota Externa", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Aliquota Externa", ">") EndCase &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &ImpRedAlqIcmExt1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPREDALQICMINT' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &ImpRedAlqIcmInt1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpRedAlqIcmInt1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Aliquota Interna", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Aliquota Interna", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = format('%1 (%2)', "Aliquota Interna", ">") EndCase &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Number = &ImpRedAlqIcmInt1 EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCSTCOFINS' &ImpCstCofins1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpCstCofins1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Cofins" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &ImpCstCofins1.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &ImpCstCofins1.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCSTIPI' &ImpCstIpi1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpCstIpi1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "IPI" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = '' do Case Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "00" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "00 - Entrada c/ Recuperação Crédito"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "01" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "01 - Entrada tributada c/ alíquota zero"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "02" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "02 - Entrada isenta"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "03" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "03 - Entrada não-tributada"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "04" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "04 - Entrada imune"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "05" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "05 - Entrada com suspensão"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "49" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "49 - Outras Entradas"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "50" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "50 - Saída Tributada"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "51" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "51 - Saída tributada c/ alíquota zero"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "52" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "52 - Saída isenta"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "53" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "53 - Saída não-tributada"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "54" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "54 - Saída imune"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "55" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "55 - Saída com suspensão"
Case &ImpCstIpi1.ToString().Trim() = "99" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "99 - Outras Saídas"
EndCase EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'IMPCSTPIS' &ImpCstPis1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpCstPis1.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Pis" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True If Not &ImpCstPis1.IsEmpty() &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = &ImpCstPis1.EnumerationDescription() Endif EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'IMPCFOCOD' &ImpCfoCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &ImpCfoCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "CFOP" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = WWP_Export_SecureText(&ImpCfoCod2) EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'SITCOD' &SitCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &SitCod2.IsEmpty() &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Color = 3 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn).Text = "Situacao" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Italic = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = '' do Case Case &SitCod2 = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "00 - TRIBUTADA INTEGRALMENTE"
Case &SitCod2 = 02 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "02 - TRIBUTACAO MONOFASICA PROPRIA - SOBRE COMBUSTIVEIS"
Case &SitCod2 = 10 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "10 - TRIBUTADA E COM COBRANÇA ICMS POR S.T."
Case &SitCod2 = 15 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "15 - TRIBUTACAO MONOFASICA PROPRIA COM RETENCAO - SOBRE COMBUSTIVEIS"
Case &SitCod2 = 20 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "20 - COM REDUÇÃO DE BASE DE CALCULO"
Case &SitCod2 = 30 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "30 - ISENTA OU NÃO TRIBUTADA, COM COBRANCA DO ICMS POR S.T."
Case &SitCod2 = 40 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "40 - ISENTA"
Case &SitCod2 = 41 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "41 - NÃO TRIBUTADA"
Case &SitCod2 = 50 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "50 - SUSPENSÃO"
Case &SitCod2 = 51 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "51 - DIFERIMENTO"
Case &SitCod2 = 53 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "53 - TRIBUTACAO MONOFASICA COM DIFERIMENTO - SOBRE COMBUSTIVEIS"
Case &SitCod2 = 60 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "60 - ICMS COBRADO ANTERIORMENTE POR S.T."
Case &SitCod2 = 61 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "61 - TRIBUTACAO MONOFASICA COBRADO ANTERIORMENTE - SOBRE COMBUSTIVEIS"
Case &SitCod2 = 70 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "70 - COM REDUÇÃO DE BASE DE CÁLCULO E COBRANÇA DO ICMS POR S.T."
Case &SitCod2 = 90 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "90 - OUTRAS"
Case &SitCod2 = 101 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "101 - TRIBUTADA PELO SIMPLES NACIONAL, COM PERMISSÃO DE CRÉDITO ICMS"
Case &SitCod2 = 102 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "102 - TRIBUTADA PELO SIMPLES NACIONAL, SEM PERMISSÃO DE CRÉDITO ICMS"
Case &SitCod2 = 103 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "103 - ISENÇÃO DO ICMS NO SIMPLES NACIONAL PARA FAIXA DE RECEITA BRUTA"
Case &SitCod2 = 201 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "201 - TRIBUTADA PELO SIMPLES NACIONAL, COM PERMISSÃO DE CRÉDITO ICMS E COM COBRANÇA DO S.T."
Case &SitCod2 = 202 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "202 - TRIBUTADA PELO SIMPLES NACIONAL, SEM PERMISSÃO DE CRÉDITO ICMS E COM COBRANÇA DO S.T."
Case &SitCod2 = 203 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + 1).Text = "203 - ISENÇÃO DO ICMS NO SIMPLES NACIONAL, PARA FAIXA DE RECEITA BRUTA E COM COBRANÇA DE S.T."
